known_patterns.description: AIC periodically rotates image_ids for artworks
known_patterns.detection: image_id in our URL doesn't match current API image_id
known_patterns.action: Update to current API image_id value

known_patterns.description: Met API returns HTML tags in medium field (e.g. Tsuba)
known_patterns.detection: HTML tags in API medium/title fields

known_patterns.description: Met Museum removes objects from API (returns 404)
known_patterns.detection: API returns 404 for previously valid object ID

known_patterns.description: Price comparable with sale_price=0 is a market note, not real data
known_patterns.action: REJECT - price data must be real auction results only

known_patterns.description: Estimated price ranges are not actual auction results
known_patterns.action: REJECT - only actual verified sale results accepted

known_patterns.description: Asset description is just a copy of the Met creditLine
known_patterns.action: REWRITE - description must be original EDITION content

known_patterns.description: Met API uses different dash characters (en-dash vs em-dash vs hyphen)
AIC IIIF images return 403 for bot requests due to Cloudflare
known_patterns.action: Known false positive - images work in browsers

lessons_learned.lesson: Never trust API data without verification. Even trusted institutions have data quality issues.
Image IDs can change without notice. Always verify against current API.
Price data must come from actual auction results, never estimates or market notes.
Descriptions copied from API creditLines are not acceptable. All text must be original.
